omniProcessElements.name: CompareDocumentTypes
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "CompareDocumentTypes", "remoteClass" : "DFDFW_APP_GetDocTypeController", "remoteMethod" : "compareDocumentTypes", "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "" }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "useContinuation" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: DataMapperExtractAction1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetServiceApplicationDetails", "ignoreCache" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "recordId" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: DataMapperPostAction2
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "bundle" : "DFDFWUpdateFileCategory", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: SetValues1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "SetValues1", "elementValueMap" : { "DocumentTypes" : "=SPLIT(%DocumentTypesString%, \";\", 10)", "SubmittedDocumentTypes" : "=IF(%ContentVersions:FileCategory%, ARRAY(%ContentVersions:FileCategory%), [])", "MapRoute" : "=CONTAINS(%EventType%, \"Parade\") || CONTAINS(%EventType%, \"Run_Walk_Ride\")" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SyncFilesToCityWorks
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "SyncFilesToCityWorks", "remoteClass" : "DFDFW_INTOIC_DocUploadController", "remoteMethod" : "uploadFilesToCityWorks", "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "" }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "ContextId" : "%ContextId%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "useContinuation" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "lwcComponentOverride" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.name: AdditionalFile
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Additional Documents", "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "uploadContDoc" : true, "contentParentId" : [ "%recordId%" ], "extraPayload" : { }, "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null } }

childElements.name: FoodVendorNamesFile
MapOfYourRouteFile
TextBlock1
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock1", "text" : "

Please upload the documents listed below:

\n
    \n
  • Emergency Plan
    • \n
  • ADA Plan
    • \n
  • Approval Letter from Alderperson
    • \n
  • Certificate of Insurance
    • \n
  • Event Site Map
    • \n
", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: TextBlock2
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock2", "text" : "

Please upload the documents listed below:

\n

%filesNeeded%

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: TextBlock3
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock3", "text" : "

Please upload any required documents listed below for Application Number %applicationDetailID:ApplicationNumber%:

\n

All documents are required prior to the issuance of any permits.

\n

The system accepts files in the following formats: gif, jpg, jpeg, png, tiff, bmp, pdf, txt, rtf, csv, doc, docx, xls, xlsx, ppt, pptx, zip.

\n

Each file must not exceed a maximum size of 8 MB.

\n

For assistance completing the Event Site Map please review the Special Events \"all you need to know\" page.

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: TrafficControlPlanFile

omniProcessElements.name: UploadDoc
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Upload Documents", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : "0", "nextLabel" : "Done", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
